evals.name: trigger-with-skill
evals.prompt: Selected: <playbook or decision>. Design a reusable Button component with compound support for icon, text, and loading states.
evals.expected_output: Selects react-component-designer and addresses component API design.

evals.name: trigger-without-skill
evals.prompt: Selected: <playbook or decision>. How do I configure my webpack build for production optimization?
evals.expected_output: Does NOT select react-component-designer; selects a different skill better suited for build configuration.
